synopsis:
**Before the Exciting Events of Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker!**

Hounded by the First Order across the galaxy, the Resistance is in dire need of ships, weapons and recruits to make a final stand against Kylo Ren's forces. Desperation drives a delegation led by General Leia Organa and Rey to entreat the Rebel veteran's one-time allies, the Mon Calamari, to join the fight.
title: Allegiance #2
